summary_en: 227,000 shares (5.2% of shares outstanding) acquired for ¥205.4M via ToSTNeT-3 off-exchange method on 2026-05-15. Program authorization limit fully executed; acquisition concluded.
title_en: Notice of Treasury Share Acquisition Results via ToSTNeT-3 Off-Exchange Trading and Completion of Acquisition Program
translation_en_brief: On 2026-05-15, TAKAMISAWA CYBERNETICS COMPANY, LTD. executed its treasury share acquisition program authorized by board resolution on 2026-05-14. The company acquired 227,000 shares (5.2% of issued shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) via ToSTNeT-3 off-exchange trading for a total consideration of ¥205,435,000. This acquisition exhausted the authorized limit and marks the completion of the program. The stated rationale is to improve capital efficiency and return value to shareholders, while retaining operational flexibility to respond to changes in the business environment through timely capital allocation decisions.
